verdicts.title: Packaged DMG/NSIS builds never ship staged web assets; wallet sign-in cannot work there
verdicts.note: stage.mjs writes web to <dest>/web (stage.mjs:726,771; default dest apps/desktop/resources at :94) and resolveRuntimePaths expects <base>/web (runtime-paths.ts:82), but electron-builder.yml:36-40 maps only resources/runtime, so packaged <resourcesPath>/web is never populated → wallet_page_routes.py:52-58 'not served' → /wallet.html 404 (wallet-login.ts:39).

verdicts.title: Supervised ai-backend env omits BACKEND_BASE_URL, degrading desktop runs to Null resolvers
verdicts.note: service-env.ts ai-backend branch sets only MCP/SKILLS registry URLs (228-229), no BACKEND_BASE_URL; ProjectResolverFactory.default returns NullProjectResolver when BACKEND_BASE_URL unset (project_resolver.py:295-300); fix bcc65dbb (#114) is NOT an ancestor of the audit-base HEAD, so the bug is present at this base as claimed.

verdicts.title: Desktop boot implemented twice (run-local.mjs Node vs supervisor TS) and copies drifted
verdicts.note: Material drift confirmed: initdb -U postgres -A trust (run-local.mjs:277-286) vs -U atlas --auth=scram-sha-256 (postgres.ts:169-176); DB names backend/ai_backend (run-local.mjs:313-314) vs atlas_backend/atlas_ai (service-env.ts:44-45); RUNTIME_ENABLE_LOCAL_MODELS only in run-local (420), SIWE_ORIGIN/RUNTIME_EVENT_BUS_BACKEND only in supervisor (service-env.ts:191,227); both 'exactly the way...' headline claims are false (run-local.mjs:3-4, README.md:4-6).

verdicts.title: RUNTIME_ENABLE_LOCAL_MODELS documented in the boot contract but the real supervisor never sets it
verdicts.note: README.md:70 documents the flag as surfacing Settings→Local models and run-local.mjs:420 sets it, but grep of service-env.ts shows no RUNTIME_ENABLE_LOCAL_MODELS in the shipped ai-backend env.

verdicts.title: Documented dev supervised recipe boots into a posture whose default sign-in cannot succeed
verdicts.note: COPILOT_RUNTIME_DIR recipe (README.md:252-257) supervises (boot-mode.ts:12-16) with children at *_ENVIRONMENT=production (service-env.ts:174,195,236) so dev-mint route is absent, yet without COPILOT_PRODUCTION=1 resolveAuthPosture yields dev-mint mode (posture.ts:24-28,44-50) and local sign-in routes to service.signIn/dev-mint (index.ts:549-551) → always fails; wallet/Google bypass OidcClient and stay usable, CLI sets COPILOT_PRODUCTION=1 and is unaffected.

verdicts.title: App/runtime identity and platform facts hand-synced across at least five files
verdicts.note: com.0x-copilot.app in branding.ts:26 + electron-builder.yml:14 + mac-shell.mjs:44; '0xCopilot' in branding.ts:21 + electron-builder.yml:15 + paths.mjs:26; SUPPORTED_KEYS in paths.mjs:52-56 duplicates manifest keys; assemble-payload.mjs:26-33 SERVICES mirrors stage.mjs:56-72 (explicit 'Mirror' comment); APP_VERSION '0.1.0' SignInGate.tsx:26 mirrors package.json:3 — each carries a keep-in-sync comment.

verdicts.title: End users run a different Electron major than dev/CI/packaged ever exercises
verdicts.note: CLI pins electron 42.1.0 (tools/cli/package.json:26) and in payload mode electronBases=[pkgRoot,payload] (paths.mjs:102) so resolveElectronBinary (paths.mjs:137-153) resolves the CLI's own 42.x first, while the app is developed/tested/packaged against 43.1.1 (apps/desktop/package.json:46).

verdicts.title: needsStage exported but has no caller
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is per policy (stage.mjs:49-51 dead export).

verdicts.title: Boot-phase copy duplicated between main and renderer
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is per policy (supervisor.ts phase messages vs BootProgress.tsx step log).

verdicts.title: Two different default-workspace fallbacks across the IPC boundary
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is per policy (org_acme in SignInGate.tsx:19 vs wsp_unknown in index.ts:590).
